title: M7 closeout and future M8 entry prompt
summary: Close M7 after all M7 tasks are independently reviewed and integrated, then write a non-executable future M8 entry prompt without starting M8.
acceptance: Closes M7 only after all M7 tasks are done and independently reviewed
Records completed capabilities, validation matrix, technical debt, cultural review state, privacy/feedback state, save compatibility commitment state, owner gates and M8 readiness verdict
Writes coordination/reports/WM-0110-future-m8-entry-prompt.md as a non-executable future M8 prompt
Does not create, promote, claim, implement or review M8
Does not execute public release, EA launch, store submission, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or final public save compatibility commitments

history.details: Created by WM-0098 M7 planning DAG; remains proposed until WM-0109 is done.

objective: Close M7 and prepare the future M8 handoff artifact without starting M8.
forbiddenPaths: M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
public release upload store submission signing installer or updater
telemetry accounts paid services crash upload or public feedback service
final privacy legal store or public save compatibility commitments unless owner-approved and reviewed before closeout
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: closeout can accidentally start M8; future prompt must be explicitly non-executable.
Risk: M7 closeout can overclaim release readiness; separate preparation verdicts from owner-approved launch decisions.
File ownership is limited to M7 closeout, future M8 prompt, roadmap/project-state markers and WM-0110 reports.
ownerGate: Block if any M7 task remains not done, unverified or unintegrated
Block on M8 task creation, promotion, claim, implementation or review
Block on public release, EA launch, store submission, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services or final public save promises without owner approval
m0M6RegressionCoverage: Full M0-M6 regression gate must pass before closeout
Preserve M5 final hashes and benchmark threshold policy
Preserve M6 verdicts unless a reviewed owner-approved M7 decision changes them
benchmarkImpact: No threshold weakening. Closeout must cite isolated bench evidence and explain any warning/blocking regression.
reviewRouting: project-director completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies all M7 tasks are done/verified/integrated, future M8 prompt is non-executable and no M8 work started.
rollbackModel: Revert M7 closeout, future M8 prompt and roadmap/project-state markers; leave verified M7 task artifacts intact and M8 unstarted.

sparkEligibility.reason: Milestone closeout and future M8 handoff are project-director work requiring independent review.
